hero.name: Daniel Mira
hero.proposition: I build web applications and cybersecurity tools by combining software engineering, networking and a security-first mindset.
hero.available: Open to remote opportunities and selected projects.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Who I am
about.bio: I'm a Systems and Computer Engineering graduate passionate about cybersecurity and web development. I specialize in Purple Team operations, bridging offensive and defensive security practices to build more resilient systems.
about.bio2: With experience in ethical hacking, SOC analysis, and full-stack development, I bring a unique security-first mindset to every project I work on.

security.title: Security First
security.description: I approach every project with a security mindset, identifying vulnerabilities before they become problems.

learning.title: Continuous Learning
learning.description: The security landscape evolves daily. I stay current with the latest threats, tools, and techniques.

quality.title: Quality Code
quality.description: Clean, maintainable, and well-documented code that stands the test of time.
